caption:
AI startups are pulling a page from the 90s B-movie playbook — rush out a low-budget knockoff while the blockbuster is still hot, pocket the algorithmic search traffic, repeat. The Verge reports that AI-generated direct-to-video films are already operating on that exact economic logic, with studios using text-to-video tools to churn out content timed to tentpole releases. It's less 'future of cinema' and more 'Sharknado with a GPU.'

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIVideo #GenerativeAI #AIFilm #DirectToVideo #AICreators #CreatorEconomy

story.title: AI startups release direct-to-video generated films as cash-grab strategy
story.dek: An AI startup is capitalizing on blockbuster hype by rushing out AI-generated films directly to digital release, mirroring decades-old direct-to-video B-movie economics.
